rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Impensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus Tipografia Poliglotta Vaticana Impensis Petri Comos Ethiopis, Valerius Doricus Tipografia Poliglotta Vaticana Tipografia Poliglotta Vaticana In Bybliotheca Vaticana, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

oa:Annotation.lawd:hasName: (spiritual) son of ʾabbā ʾAbsādi of Dabra Māryām

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Readings on the resurrection of Our Lord Jesus Christ from the Gospels
Ordinary of the mass and Anaphora of the Apostles
Readings and prayers for the Daily Office
Readings for the time of the twilight
Readings for the middle of the night
ሰላም፡ ወይእዜኒ፡ አኀዊነ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘርቱዕ፡ ወዘንጹሕ፡ ወዘ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ግበሩ፡
Prayers recited by the priest during the mass and Anaphora of the Apostles

crm:E52_Time-span.crm:P78_is_identified_by: 24th Yakkātit of the year of mercy 181
